cards.back: A set of values that emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and rapid delivery in software development
The cost of changing existing processes, systems, or structures to accommodate a new or changed direction
The process of planning, implementing, and managing changes within an organization to minimize disruption and maximize benefits
The cost of being more flexible in plans, processes, and structures, which can include reduced predictability and increased uncertainty
The cost of maintaining existing processes, systems, and structures, which can make it more difficult to change or adapt to new circumstances
